headline: Tapestry (TPR) On Digital Growth Narrative And Why Fair Value Still Sits Higher
summary: Tapestry (TPR) is back in focus for investors after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 9% year to date but down roughly 6% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Tapestry. Recent trading has been choppy for Tapestry, with the share price down over the past month and quarter but still positive year to date. Long term total shareholder returns over 1, 3 and 5 years remain strong, which suggests earlier optimism has not fully carried through into recent momentum. If...
